intent.goal: Eliminate a batch of warren UI papercuts so tables and run-launch flows behave consistently and reduce manual steps for the operator.
success_criteria: Sortable tables across all pages share consistent sort affordances and behavior for common columns (e.g. date/started, status)
Triggering a plan run after a planner finishes auto-populates the plan_id, mirroring how plot_id is prefilled for workspace runs
